body:
The Clerical Reallocation Officer is responsible for the reallocation of payments within a single taxpayer record.

The following list shows the functions linked to the role of Clerical Reallocation Officer. Access to the same functions is available in an office with processing, technical or recovery responsibilities.

For details of how to access any of these functions, select ‘Index Of Functions’ on the left of the screen.

On accessing the function, system help is available to you at function, screen, field, and error message levels.

For ease of reference, functions are grouped under the following sub headings

Compliance
Returns
Statements
Taxpayer

Compliance

View Compliance History

Returns

Maintain Return Summary

Statements

Clerical Reallocation

Transfer from Taxpayer Credit

View Payment Details

View Repayment

View Statement

View Transfer from OAS

Taxpayer

Case Summary

Maintain SA Notes

View Taxpayer Designatory Details
title: Manage work: access to records: clerical reallocation officer - processing, recovery and technical offices
